misc: Known for bomb drives despite his advanced age.
Finally made his first hole-in-one on May 24th, 2025, after 20 years of trying.
biography: Harri, affectionately known in golfing circles as "the doctor", is a familiar face at the Hector Trophée. Representing Hattula Golf, Harri is set to make his seventh appearance at the tournament in 2026. With two Hector Trophée victories under his belt, he brings a wealth of experience to the competition.

Despite his advanced age, Harri is renowned for his bomb drives, consistently wowing spectators with his power off the tee. His dedication to the sport is evident in his relentless pursuit of perfection. After two decades of trying, Harri finally achieved his first hole-in-one on May 24th, 2025, a testament to his unwavering commitment and perseverance.
While the coveted Victor Trophy has eluded him so far, Harri remains a formidable competitor, and his presence in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026 is sure to add excitement to the event.
